cases.prompt: Add a new Socket.IO event for a server-driven orchestration action.
expectation: Identify the server event wiring in webapp/server/index.js.
Update the matching client listener or emitter path in webapp/client/src/App.jsx.
Call out any tests that should be added or updated.

cases.prompt: Add a new worker-card UI affordance for agent state.
expectation: Locate the relevant component under webapp/client/src/components/.
Preserve the existing Tailwind-based glassmorphism styling approach.
Mention the corresponding client-side test file that should cover the interaction.

cases.prompt: Update dependency-graph behavior after manifest changes.
expectation: Trace the server-side manifest parsing and graph rebuild path.
Keep agent hydration, graph updates, and unloaded dependency state aligned.
Reference the integration-style tests that protect this workflow.

cases.prompt: Improve how saved sessions are restored or re-spawned.
expectation: Identify session persistence code under webapp/server/sessionStore.js or related files.
Preserve the distinction between UI restore and live re-spawn behavior.
Mention tests that validate session lifecycle behavior.

cases.prompt: Refresh this repo's AI-readiness assets after structural changes.
expectation: Use the repo-level AgentRC harness commands.
Regenerate AGENTS.md or VS Code AI config when appropriate.
Re-run readiness and summarize which files explain the repo's conventions.
